mnemonics.title: RL Components
mnemonics.content: **SARSP** - State, Action, Reward, State (next), Policy. Remember: Agent observes State, takes Action, gets Reward, sees new State, updates Policy.

mnemonics.title: Explore vs Exploit
mnemonics.content: **E**xplore **E**verything **E**agerly, **E**xploit **E**xpertise **E**arly - The 5 E's to remember both strategies in the trade-off.

mnemonics.title: Return Formula
mnemonics.content: **G**amma **R**educes **G**radually: G = R + γR + γ²R + ... The discount factor γ multiplies each subsequent reward.

mnemonics.title: RL Definition
mnemonics.content: **A**gent **L**earns from **E**xperience: The Agent Learns through Environment interactions, getting Evaluated by Rewards.

mnemonics.title: Epsilon-Greedy
mnemonics.content: **E**psilon **E**quals **E**xploration: With ε probability explore (random), with 1-ε exploit (best known). Start with high ε, decrease over time.
